description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage, defining variables APT_CACHE_DIR and CARGO_HOME pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/apt and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo. Add a fmt-check job in the build stage using the rustlang/rust:nightly image, which runs rustup component add rustfmt-preview --toolchain nightly then cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check, and is allowed to fail. Add a rust-latest job that extends a hidden .rust-build-test template, runs on the rust:latest image, uses a cache keyed "latest" for apt/, cargo/, and target/ directories, and executes rustc --version, cargo --version, cargo build --verbose, and cargo test --verbose. Add a rust-nightly job similar to rust-latest but using the rustlang/rust:nightly image, cache key "nightly", allowed to fail, and runs the same build and test commands. Add a pages job in the build stage, also using rustlang/rust:nightly, allowed to fail, restricted to the master branch, which caches with key "nightly", runs cargo doc --document-private-items, moves the generated docs to a public/ folder, creates an index.html redirect to node_amqp/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
